response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of professional full-stack development with direct, current experience in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK) and active AI agent infrastructure work at his current role — both of which are strong signals for fit. His testing culture is unusually deep for a developer, evidenced by TDD practice, co-authored testing frameworks, and multiple workshops. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience, limited relational DB focus (PostgreSQL/MySQL appear minor), and no Kotlin on the resume, though these are learnable given his broad multi-language background.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience with current hands-on TypeScript, Node.js, and React work
Direct AI agent infrastructure contribution at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) — rare and directly relevant
Exceptionally strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and instructor of TDD/CI workshops
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere on the resume — the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin is absent from listed skills; Java appears only in older embedded/robotics contexts, not backend services
Relational database experience (PostgreSQL, MySQL) is minimal; MongoDB dominates, which may require ramp-up for SQL-heavy services
